# JSON Deserialization Error in Stationpedia Ascended (2026-01-25 02:51Z)

_**User (2026-01-25 02:53Z)**_

[Error  :Stationpedia Ascended] Error loading descriptions: Cannot deserialize the current JSON object (e.g. {"name":"value"}) into type 'System.Collections.Generic.List`1[StationpediaAscended.Data.TableRow]' because the type requires a JSON array (e.g. [1,2,3]) to deserialize correctly.
To fix this error either change the JSON to a JSON array (e.g. [1,2,3]) or change the deserialized type so that it is a normal .NET type (e.g. not a primitive type like integer, not a collection type like an array or List<T>) that can be deserialized from a JSON object. JsonObjectAttribute can also be added to the type to force it to deserialize from a JSON object.
Path 'guides[5].OperationalDetails[6].children[0].table.headers', line 36834, position 26.
